intro.title: The best watersports in Egypt, right on the Red Sea
intro.body: Welcome to SharmRush, the home of premium watersports in Sharm El Sheikh. Our flat, turquoise lagoons and reliable thermal wind make the Red Sea one of the best places on earth to learn and progress in kitesurfing, windsurfing and wingfoil. Whether it is your very first lesson or you are chasing your next freestyle trick, our certified instructors and modern equipment get you on the water fast and safe.

activities.title: Watersports Activities
activities.subtitle: From your first lesson to advanced freeride — choose your discipline and we will handle the rest.
activities.intro: SharmRush offers the full range of premium watersports in Sharm El Sheikh. Every activity includes equipment, safety briefing and coaching tailored to your level, delivered by certified instructors on one of the best spots on the Red Sea.

kitesurfing.name: Kitesurfing
kitesurfing.tagline: Harness the wind, glide over the Red Sea
kitesurfing.description: Kitesurfing in Sharm El Sheikh is unforgettable — steady thermal wind, warm shallow water and wide open lagoons make it the perfect place to learn or progress. Our IKO-certified instructors guide you from kite control on the beach to riding your first waves, with the latest gear and full safety equipment included.

windsurfing.name: Windsurfing
windsurfing.description: Windsurfing in Egypt is a timeless thrill, and the Sharm El Sheikh lagoons are made for it. With flat water for beginners and stronger wind for freeriders, our windsurfing courses build your balance, technique and confidence step by step on premium boards and rigs suited to your level.

wingfoil.name: Wingfoil
wingfoil.description: Wingfoil in Sharm El Sheikh is the fastest-growing watersport on the Red Sea — the magical feeling of flying silently above the surface on a hydrofoil. Our wingfoil sessions take you from handling the wing to your first foiling flights with modern, easy-to-learn equipment and patient expert coaching.

cta.title: Not sure which to choose?
cta.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp — we will recommend the perfect activity for your level.

location.title: Find Us in Sharm El Sheikh
location.subtitle: Right on the Red Sea, in the heart of Sharm El Sheikh.
location.body: SharmRush is located on the shores of Sharm El Sheikh, one of the best watersports destinations on the Red Sea in Egypt. Our beach base offers easy access to flat lagoons and open water, with equipment storage, changing facilities and a relaxed lounge to enjoy between sessions. We are easy to reach from all major hotels and resorts in the area.
